title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. malacum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. malacum, also known as a subspecies of the dark hawk's beard plant, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion-like hawkweed family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. malacum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
